name: Crafty Cooks
author: Poki
description: Crafty Cooks is a restaurant management game where you take charge of a bustling chicken fast food restaurant. Your goal is to take customer orders, prepare delicious meals, and serve food quickly to keep everyone happy. As you serve more customers, more money will come in. Use your earnings to upgrade your kitchen, hire more staff and expand your business! Can you build the best restaurant in town? How to play Crafty Cooks? Use WASD or the arrow keys to walk around! Who created Crafty Cooks? Crafty Cooks was created by Purrfect Games. Play their other game on Poki: Crazy Road Trip How can I play Crafty Cooks for free? You can play Crafty Cooks for free on Poki. Can I play Crafty Cooks on mobile devices and desktop? Crafty Cooks can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
